Catherine Stonebreaker has
brought suit for divorce against
Edward Stonebreaker, alleging that
he knocker her senseless on one
occasion.


Three companies of the Second
infantry have been rushed to the
scene of the forest fires in Idaho
and Montana. This makes 600
soldiers on the ground.


Detective Walter Hogan returned
yesterday from Idaho with Ray
Wilson, wanted on charge of
grand larceny.


Father Herman J. Collier, S. j.,
returned to Spokane yesterday and
will spend 10 days visiting at Con
zaga college.


Justice of the Peace S. c. Hyde
yesterday married E. w. WinslOw,
40, and Mrs. E. w. Moore, SO. 1t
was the second marriage for both.
